topic.description: Short label for the batch of drafts. Appears in the widget header and in the proceed payload. 2-6 words, no trailing period.

submit_instruction.description: Fallback action when the user submits without typing into the prompt field. Be concrete: a real next-step instruction such as 'Save these to Linear in the SAPP team' or 'Rewrite with the OKR alignment template, do not save yet'.

issues.description: Drafted Linear issues to edit inline. Non-empty.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier, unique within this payload. Used by the widget for per-issue state. Not the Linear issue ID.

linear_id.description: Linear issue identifier (e.g. 'SAPP-3596') when this entry edits an existing Linear issue. Omit for fresh drafts. When present, the widget hides the Discard button for this issue and renders an 'editing <id>' badge; the Proceed payload marks the issue as an UPDATE rather than an INCLUDED draft.

title.description: Short imperative issue title. For existing issues, pre-populate with the current Linear title.

description.description: Issue body as Markdown. Use real newlines, not escaped \n sequences. For existing issues, pre-populate with the current Linear description.
